title: Alex's Caves X Woodworks Compat Datapack
description: Swaps out the generic Chests/Ladders in AC Structures for their Woodworks Pewen/Thornwood Versions using Every Compat.
body:
This is a Simple Datapack that Swaps out the Chests/Barrels and Ladders from the Cavemen Houses/Forlorn Huts From [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) to use the [Woodworks](https://modrinth.com/mod/woodworks) Chests/Ladders added by [Every Compat (Wood Good)](https://modrinth.com/mod/every-compat).

**Intended to be used with My Resource Pack: [Alex's Caves X Woodworks/FD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alexs-caves-x-woodworks-farmers-delight)**

### This Datapack changes NBT files, meaning it will not be compatible with any other Datapack/Mod that changes these Structures.
